name: Glass Fried Chicken Christmas Tree Ornament - Wondershop™: Indoor Decoration
description:
Fried chicken is cool again, so add this Glass Fried Chicken Christmas Tree Ornament from Wondershop™ to your tree for a timely, fun decoration. A sparkly chicken sits atop the red and white bucket to create an eye-pleasing prop for hanging. There’s even a chicken illustration on the bucket of this glass ornament for an ornament that's sure to satisfy.

100% Satisfaction Guaranteed.
